$comment: Machine-readable index of surge_ui. Generated by tool/build_catalog.dart from the Catalog: doc headers - do not hand-edit. Search before writing custom UI.

components.name: SurgeButton
components.summary: The standard text button in five variants.
components.whenToUse: Any tappable action label. Use primary for the main action on a screen, secondary/ghost for supporting actions, destructive for delete.

components.name: SurgeIconButton
components.summary: A 44pt tappable icon, optionally accent/danger tinted or on a scrim.
components.whenToUse: Icon-only actions in toolbars, cards, or over imagery (scrim).

components.name: SurgeMagicCta
components.summary: An animated "magic/auto" pill — a breathing accent glow with twinkles around the icon.
components.whenToUse: The AI/automatic option on a screen, to set it apart from ordinary buttons without shouting.

components.name: SurgeActionCard
components.summary: A tappable card with a leading icon tile, title/subtitle, and a selected state (accent border + check).
components.whenToUse: Selectable options, plan/onboarding choices, or navigable feature entries.

components.name: SurgeCard
components.summary: A padded rounded surface with a hairline border and optional float shadow.
components.whenToUse: Grouping arbitrary content into a card. For a tappable option card use SurgeActionCard.

components.name: SurgeBadge
components.summary: A small status pill (optional leading icon) in a semantic tint.
components.whenToUse: Inline status/markers — "New", "Saved", "PRO", counts. For tappable filters use SurgeFilterChip.

components.name: SurgeFilterChip
components.summary: A 32pt pill filter chip; selected shows a leading check and accent tint.
components.whenToUse: Toggleable filters. Set stableWidth in multi-select grids so toggling never reflows.

components.name: SurgeTagChip
components.summary: A 28pt read-only pill, optionally with a leading icon and a remove affordance.
components.whenToUse: Displaying applied tags/filters. Pass onRemove to make it dismissible.

components.name: SurgeBanner
components.summary: An inline message on a tinted surface, with optional icon, action, and dismiss.
components.whenToUse: Persistent, in-context messages (tips, warnings, status). For transient toasts, use a snackbar.

components.name: SurgeEmptyState
components.summary: A centered icon circle, title, subtitle, and optional primary/ghost actions.
components.whenToUse: Empty lists, zero-results, or a first-run screen body. Also fits error states with a retry action.

components.name: SurgeIndeterminateBar
components.summary: A 2px accent bar that sweeps continuously for unknown-duration work.
components.whenToUse: Ongoing work with no measurable progress (a running import/request).

components.name: SurgeLoadingLabel
components.summary: A word followed by three dots that hop in a staggered wave.
components.whenToUse: A friendly full-screen/sheet wait ("Importing", "Analyzing"). For compact loading use SurgeSpinner.

components.name: SurgeProgressBar
components.summary: A 2px determinate progress fill (0..1), eased.
components.whenToUse: Known progress (steps, upload). For unknown duration use SurgeIndeterminateBar.

components.name: SurgeSkeleton
components.summary: A shimmering placeholder block for loading content.
components.whenToUse: Content placeholders while data loads, instead of a spinner on lists/cards.

components.name: SurgeSpinner
components.summary: A 2px-stroke circular activity indicator in the accent color.
components.whenToUse: Inline loading. Buttons already show one internally via loading:.

components.name: SurgeSearchField
components.summary: A 44pt search field with a leading magnifier and optional clear.
components.whenToUse: Filtering or searching a list. For general text entry use SurgeTextField.

components.name: SurgeTextField
components.summary: Single- or multi-line text input with inset fill and focus/error/warning borders.
components.whenToUse: Any free-text entry. Set obscureText for passwords, multiline for notes.

components.name: SurgePlaceholder
components.summary: A diagonally-hatched image placeholder with a small monospace label.
components.whenToUse: A deliberate stand-in for a missing image/thumbnail. For loading shimmer use SurgeSkeleton.

components.name: SurgeFloatingNavBar
components.summary: A detached pill-shaped bottom tab bar that floats above content on a lifted panel.
components.whenToUse: The app shell's bottom navigation in personality packs that float their chrome (soft_depth). Pair with Scaffold(extendBody: true) so content scrolls beneath it.

components.name: SurgeSheet
components.summary: A bottom-sheet shell with a grabber, optional title + Done, scrollable body, and fixed foot.
components.whenToUse: Modal content from the bottom. Present it with showSurgeSheet so it rides above the keyboard.

components.name: SurgeToast
components.summary: A bottom-anchored pill toast, branded per kind (neutral outline, success/error fills).
components.whenToUse: Transient confirmation/errors. Call showSurgeToast; it coalesces so a new message replaces the old.

components.name: showSurgeActionMenu
components.summary: A context menu presented as a sheet of icon+label rows with a cancel foot.
components.whenToUse: A "more actions" (...) menu. Each item runs its onSelected after the sheet closes.

components.name: SurgeGroupRow
components.summary: A row inside a SurgeGroupSection — optional square icon tile, title/subtitle, and a value, toggle, or chevron trailing.
components.whenToUse: Individual settings/preferences rows. Pass toggle for a switch row, value for a read-only value, chevron to drill in.

components.name: SurgeGroupSection
components.summary: An iOS-style grouped section — uppercase header, a card of rows with hairline dividers, and a footer.
components.whenToUse: Settings and form screens. Fill with SurgeGroupRow children.

components.name: SurgeIconTile
components.summary: A small rounded icon chip (circle or square) on an accent tint.
components.whenToUse: The leading glyph of a list/settings row, or a standalone badge.

components.name: SurgeListRow
components.summary: A 56pt list row with optional leading icon/tile, title, subtitle, trailing, and chevron.
components.whenToUse: Rows in a scrolling list. For grouped iOS-style settings use SurgeGroupSection + SurgeGroupRow.

components.name: SurgeSegmented
components.summary: A 36pt segmented control on an inset track, with a sliding or cross-fading thumb.
components.whenToUse: 2-4 mutually exclusive options. expand:true for equal slices, false to size to labels.

components.name: SurgeStepper
components.summary: A 36pt -/+ stepper with a tabular value and selection haptics.
components.whenToUse: Adjusting a bounded number (quantity, servings, a goal). Pass step/format to tune.

components.name: SurgeToggle
components.summary: A 51x31 on/off switch with a sliding knob and selection haptic.
components.whenToUse: Boolean settings. Inside a grouped settings row, SurgeGroupRow already renders one.
